title: Yokai Misfits - Cobblemon
description: A Cobblemon Pack Made for a Fun, Immersive Experience
body: Gotta craft 'em all! Yokai Misfits - Cobblemon is a carefully curated Cobblemon modpack that blends performance optimization with an expansive and immersive gameplay experience. Whether you're a dedicated trainer or an adventurer at heart, this modpack enhances both the Pokémon-inspired and Minecraft survival aspects of the game.
